name: agent_runner_poc
description: PoC reference agents for the Canvas Agent Runner Framework (KOALA-5544). ChartSummary drafts a Plan on note creation; LongitudinalCareAdvisor reviews encounters on note lock and tracks recommendations across visits via Custom Data.

handlers.description: Emits RunAgentEffect for ChartSummary when a note enters the NEW state
Emits RunAgentEffect for LongitudinalCareAdvisor when a note transitions to LOCKED

agents.description: Drafts a Plan command on the new mutable note
Reviews the locked encounter against prior visits' open recommendations; creates Tasks for outstanding follow-up
